topStories.description: Trump does not reference a downed US jet in his post but points to a deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.description: Trump and Netanyahu are harbouring the same illusions Saddam Hussein had in 1980 when he invaded Iran.

topStories.title: Missing Since 1994, US Girl Found Alive After 32 Years In Cold Case Breakthrough
topStories.description: Christina Maria Plante, a resident of Star Valley in Arizona, was last seen on May 15, 1994. She had left her home to walk to a nearby stable but did not return.

topStories.description: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

topStories.description: When it comes to what the US will do next, Jeffries said the best hope for the Trump administration would be a "sudden implosion" of the current Iranian administration.

dailyNews.description: Says incident occurred in July 2024 but came to light months later after the minor became pregnant.

dailyNews.title: How US Trains Pilots To Survive, Evade Capture After Being Shot Down
dailyNews.description: The blueprint for these missions comes from the Personnel Recovery Joint Publication, which lays out two overriding imperatives. First, safeguard the aircrew and then secure sensitive systems.

dailyNews.title: MVA rift: Uddhav likely to back Sunetra Pawar in Baramati bypoll, but Congress not on board

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Charlie Chaplin: ‘You’ll never find a rainbow if…'
dailyNews.description: Charlie Chaplin's timeless words — 'You'll never find a rainbow if you're looking down' — remind us that hope is a direction, not just a feeling. Look up, and life's beauty reveals itself.

dailyNews.title: Central govt must not treat states as subordinates: SC Justice Nagarathna
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court Justice BV Nagarathna said the central government should treat states as equals, promoting cooperative federalism over hierarchical governance.
